paragraphs: Data Analyst with 3+ years of experience analyzing complex datasets to uncover actionable insights and support data-driven decision making. Experienced in working with large-scale financial and healthcare datasets, including policyholder records, insurance claims, and patient billing systems.

Skilled in Python, SQL, and R with strong expertise in data cleaning, transformation, statistical analysis, and visualization using Power BI and Tableau. Experienced in building data pipelines, optimizing SQL queries, and developing dashboards that improve operational efficiency and business insights.
